basic_details.job_title: GGH Kadapa Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Doctor, Chowkidar and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Government General Hospital Kadapa (GGH Kadapa) Doctor, Chowkidar and More Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 04 June 2026 on the official website https://kadapa.ap.gov.in. A total of 9 vacancies have been announced through the GGH Kadapa Doctor, Chowkidar and More Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 42 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/BC/EWS: 5 years; Ex-Servicemen: 3 years + length of service; Differently abled: 10 years; Maximum with all relaxations: 52 years.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with registration in medical council, Graduate with experience of managing centres, SSC or equivalent, Graduate in Social sciences preferably Social work/psychology, Experience of at least three years in discipline, Literate Ex-drug user with 1-2 years sobriety
qualification.details: Doctor/Psychiatrist: MBBS with registration in medical council / medical commission along with should undergo training arranged by the MOSJE/ NISD within three months of joining the IRCA. Project Coordinator cum Vocational Counsellor: Graduate with experience of managing such centres for a minimum of three years or demonstrable capability for running such centres and having working knowledge of computers. Chowkidar: Passed in SSC or equivalent examination in recognised board. House keeping Staff (full time): Passed in SSC or equivalent examination in recognised board. Counsellor / Social Worker/ Psychologist: Graduate in Social sciences preferably in Social work/ psychology with 1-2 years experience in the field and should have knowledge of English as well as one regional language. Preference shall be given to the person holding a certificate of Training Course in De-Addition counselling from recognized institution. Yoga Therapist/ Dance Teacher/ Music Teacher/ Art Teacher (Part time): Possessing experience of at least three years in the discipline. Peer Educator: Should be literate: Ex-drug user with 1-2 years of sobriety, willing to work among drug using population and having communication skills. Agrees to refrain from using, buying, or selling drugs: Ready to work for the prevention of harmful drug use and relapse.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Yoga Therapist/ Dance Teacher/ Music Teacher/ Art Teacher (Part time)

selection_process: Aggregate of marks obtained in all years in qualifying examination (90%) Weightage for No. of years since passing qualifying examination (up to 10 marks @ 1 mark per completed year)
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://kadapa.ap.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GGH Kadapa recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the GGH Kadapa Various Posts in Drug De-Addiction Centre is 10-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 9 vacancies announced for various posts in the Drug De-Addiction Centre at GGH Kadapa.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline. Candidates need to send their applications to the official address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 42 years, with age relaxations applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary range for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary for the selected candidates ranges from Rs. 5000 to Rs. 60000 per month, depending on the post.

faq.question: Q6. What are the minimum qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: Qualifications vary by post, ranging from SSC to MBBS with medical council registration, and graduate degrees in social sciences with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for GGH Kadapa recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an aggregate of marks obtained in all years of the qualifying examination (90%) and weightage for the number of years since passing the qualifying examination (up to 10 marks).

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of GGH Kadapa: https://kadapa.ap.gov.in.

faq.question: Q9. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC candidates is Rs. 500/-.

faq.question: Q10. What is the application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for SC/ST candidates is Rs. 300/-.
